def negative_formatted_log_or_debug_payload_built_for_each_item_without_guard():
    rule_id = "formatted_log_or_debug_payload_built_for_each_item_without_guard"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag per-item log payload construction without checking whether the level is enabled."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
